title: fix_pipeline_next_decide_fix_response
description: Response schema for the fix_pipeline_next_decide_fix agent that decides how to deliver an already-produced code fix: as inline code suggestions on an existing merge request, as a commit to a new merge request, or as a comment when inline suggestions are not applicable.

decision.description: Use 'create_fix_on_existing_mr' when a merge request URL is provided AND every file changed by the execution step already appears in the merge request diff. Use 'create_fix_on_new_mr' when no merge request URL is provided. Use 'add_comment' when a merge request URL is provided BUT any file changed by the execution step is not present in the merge request diff — inline suggestions cannot be posted on files outside the MR diff.
